textByHash.6471a753c5bbc53b3f670b3d762a9f52b763a38f: It's quite simple. Just use a pot of flour on a bucket of water, or vice versa, and you'll make dough. You can fill a bucket with water at any sink.
textByHash.7d2128c9b80e1df56c36d1f582dbbc898981aa2f: The range is the only place you can cook a lot of the more complex foods in Gielinor. To cook on a range, all you need to do is tap on it. You'll need to make sure you have the required items in your inventory though.
textByHash.94cdd05213581429ac0824b305cb253a9ab1fa17: The range is the only place you can cook a lot of the more complex foods in Gielinor. To cook on a range, all you need to do is click on it. You'll need to make sure you have the required items in your inventory though.
textByHash.b76db1141e48e055fb14e0d0d2a15937b2621889: Ah! Welcome, newcomer. I am the Master Chef, Lev. It is here that I will teach you how to cook food truly fit for a king.
textByHash.c323d3e524b846ccef3f0d3a85c7cc0e50d37d77: Time for you to learn the fine art of cooking bread.
textByHash.d93306e95df98b8e1157efebe84ede2cf63f1a33: [laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh]! You call THAT cooking? Some shrimp on an open log fire? Oh, no, no, no. I am going to teach you the fine art of cooking bread.
